steps.title: Use vertex form
steps.content: The maximum depth is the vertex $(7,352.8)$, so use $g(t)=a(t-7)^2+352.8$. The dolphin reaches the surface at $t=14$, so $g(14)=0$.

steps.title: Evaluate at t = 12 minutes
steps.content: Evaluate the model at $t=12$: $g(12)=-7.2(12-7)^2+352.8=-7.2(25)+352.8=172.8$, which rounds to 173 meters.
